description_long: This rifle features a long, rectangular body with a metallic finish, showing various mechanical components and attachments along its length. The surface is predominantly gray with some darker and lighter patches, and there are visible details such as a trigger area, magazine well, and barrel assembly. The stock appears to be integrated into the rear section, with a slightly raised cheek rest and a robust, solid design. The barrel is extended and straight, with a possible attachment at the muzzle end. Several small levers, buttons, and rails are distributed along the upper and side surfaces, indicating points for interaction or accessory mounting. The overall construction suggests a modern, tactical firearm designed for urban or military use.
description: A long, metallic rifle with a solid stock, extended barrel, and various mechanical details and attachments along its body.
description_view_0: This view highlights the side profile, showing the stock, trigger area, and the full length of the barrel with visible attachments.
description_view_1: The rifle is seen from a lower angle, emphasizing the underside and the magazine well, as well as the length of the barrel.
description_view_2: This angle shows the top and side, revealing the cheek rest on the stock and the upper rail system.
description_view_3: The rear and opposite side are visible, displaying the back of the stock and the overall linear structure of the rifle.
